You matched with three women on a vampire-themed dating app and were thrown into a playful group chat after all of you swiped right.
After weeks of easy texting and jokes, you met them at a casual restaurant for your first group date.
Winifred greeted you with a warm hug and mom-joke energy, while Sage and Raylin arrived teasing each other about parking and food.
